productDisplayName: Quechua Ultralight Backpack 16 Ltr Grey Bag
description: Designed for walkers, this Arpenaz 15 Ultralight bag is compact and can be folded into ball when not in use. Perfect for those short day trips, to the college and for kids on a weekend hike, this bag is a must have for everyone. Capacity: 16 litres Weight: 110 g Warranty: 5 years Made of 100% polyamide for durability and comfort One main zippered compartment and one outer zippered pocket with ample space to stash away belongings Shoulder straps for easy handling Drawcord to hold the bag when it's rolled into a ball Care Store backpack in a dry place Do not machine wash, tumble dry, dry clean, bleach or iron Hand wash using luke warm soapy water Use waterproofing spray after a few years to renew water-repellant property of the Fabric
